items.prompt: I feel pride for my family.
items.answer: Я чувствую гордость за свою семью.

items.prompt: He was ashamed of his words.
items.answer: Ему было стыдно за свои слова.

items.prompt: The boredom in class was terrible.
I felt strong fright.
She has anxiety before the exam.
He still has a grudge against his brother.
items.answer: У него осталась обида на брата.

items.prompt: Envy is a bad feeling.
I felt pity for the dog.
His indifference surprises me.
Music gives me inspiration.
After the walk I found calm.
Mom has worry because of the weather.
I have a lot of stress at work.
items.answer: У меня большой стресс на работе.

items.prompt: Depression is a serious problem.
The children were delighted with the gift.
items.answer: Дети были в восторге от подарка.

items.prompt: I watched the film with horror.
The child has great curiosity.
Thank you for your sympathy.
I have longing for home.
There was malice in his voice.
I heard loud laughter.
Her crying woke everyone up.
She has a very beautiful smile.
There was a tear on her cheek.
He has high sensitivity.
No need to worry, everything will be fine.
items.answer: Не нужно волноваться, всё будет хорошо.

items.prompt: I am starting to be nervous before the meeting.
Don't be angry with me.
He often gets angry without a reason.
She takes offense at every word.
The children are shy to speak loudly.
Mom always worries about the children.
The cat gets scared of loud sounds.
I hope that you will come.
He hates cold weather.
I admire her talent.
I regret that I did not go with you.
items.answer: Я жалею, что не пошёл с вами.

items.prompt: Friends sympathize with my grief.
He constantly complains about work.
Grandmother sighs quietly.
The scared child cried for a long time.
The surprised guest did not know what to say.
items.answer: Удивлённый гость не знал, что сказать.

items.prompt: The offended friend went home.
I am a very happy person.
He had a sad voice.
The teacher is pleased with my answer.
Dad is displeased with my grades.
She came home upset.
The young man in love bought flowers.
The disappointed viewer left the concert.
